params.name: Neapolitan Fisherboy
params.description:
On Jan 30, 1833 AD, "Neapolitan Fisherboy" made its debut at the Paris Art Exhibition.
Neapolitan Fisherboy is the masterpiece of French sculptor Fran?ois. This statue uses a pyramid composition that easily represents peace and stability but also portrays a lively and dynamic image of the boy. The appearance of this statue symbolizes the transformation of Western sculpture from classicism to romanticism and has important historical significance.
